meta.description: System design interview questions for SWE and DE roles at Meta

questions.title: Design Facebook News Feed
questions.description: Design the news feed system that shows relevant posts to users when they open Facebook.
key_discussion_points: Feed generation: push vs pull model
Data storage: posts, social graph, user activity

expected_depth_by_level.E4: Core architecture, basic push/pull trade-off, simple caching
expected_depth_by_level.E5: Hybrid push/pull with celebrity handling, multi-tier caching, ranking pipeline integration, monitoring

questions.title: Design Facebook Messenger
questions.description: Design a real-time chat system supporting 1:1 and group conversations.

expected_depth_by_level.E4: Basic WebSocket architecture, message storage, delivery states
expected_depth_by_level.E5: Connection management at scale, message ordering guarantees, E2E encryption trade-offs, multi-device sync

questions.title: Design Instagram
questions.description: Design a photo-sharing social network with feed, stories, and explore features.
key_discussion_points: Image upload, processing, and storage pipeline

expected_depth_by_level.E4: Upload pipeline, CDN basics, feed generation
expected_depth_by_level.E5: Multi-resolution processing, global CDN strategy, content moderation pipeline, explore ranking

questions.title: Design a URL Shortener
questions.description: Design a URL shortening service like bit.ly.

expected_depth_by_level.E4: Core encode/decode, database choice, basic caching, analytics

questions.title: Design a Rate Limiter
questions.description: Design a distributed rate limiter for API endpoints.
key_discussion_points: Token bucket vs sliding window vs fixed window
Rate limit headers and client communication

expected_depth_by_level.E4: Algorithm choices, Redis implementation, basic distributed coordination
expected_depth_by_level.E5: Consistency in distributed setting, multi-tier rate limiting, monitoring and alerting

questions.title: Design a Notification System
questions.description: Design a system that sends push notifications, SMS, and email at scale.

expected_depth_by_level.E4: Core pipeline, multi-channel routing, basic priority handling
expected_depth_by_level.E5: Deduplication, intelligent batching, user fatigue modeling, cross-platform coordination

questions.title: Design a Distributed Key-Value Store
questions.description: Design a distributed key-value store like DynamoDB or Cassandra.

expected_depth_by_level.E5: Consistent hashing, replication, basic consistency trade-offs
expected_depth_by_level.E6: Detailed consistency models, anti-entropy protocols, cross-datacenter replication, capacity planning

questions.title: Design a Search Autocomplete System
questions.description: Design a typeahead / autocomplete system for a search bar.

expected_depth_by_level.E5: Personalized ranking, real-time trend detection, distributed trie, A/B testing integration

questions.title: Design a Data Pipeline for Analytics
questions.description: Design a data pipeline that ingests events from multiple sources and makes them available for analytics within minutes.

expected_depth_by_level.E4: Core pipeline architecture, batch vs streaming trade-offs, basic schema management
expected_depth_by_level.E5: Exactly-once semantics, schema evolution strategy, data quality monitoring, governance framework

questions.title: Design a Data Warehouse
questions.description: Design a data warehouse supporting petabyte-scale analytics for a social media company.

expected_depth_by_level.E4: Basic dimensional modeling, partition strategy, ETL pipeline
expected_depth_by_level.E5: Advanced SCD handling, query optimization, cost management, multi-tenant access control
expected_depth_by_level.E6: Enterprise-wide modeling strategy, cross-region architecture, privacy-by-design, cost optimization at scale

questions.title: Design a Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
questions.description: Design a system that powers real-time dashboards showing metrics with < 1 minute latency.
key_discussion_points: Approximate vs exact counts at scale

expected_depth_by_level.E5: Stream processing pipeline, pre-aggregation strategy, time-series storage choice
expected_depth_by_level.E6: Multi-dimensional pre-aggregation, approximate algorithms (HyperLogLog, Count-Min), late data handling, cross-DC consistency

questions.title: Design Facebook Live Video
questions.description: Design a live video streaming system supporting millions of concurrent viewers.

expected_depth_by_level.E5: Encoding pipeline, CDN strategy, basic real-time interaction
expected_depth_by_level.E6: Global CDN optimization, adaptive quality, edge computing, content moderation at scale
